message:
web: Remove Sentry tunnel proxy

Disable tunneling so Sentry events are sent directly to Sentry servers
instead of being proxied through our API.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ehwdnexqfub9ceosqkdew8u1

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,6 @@ import { Route as WaitlistRouteImport } from './routes/waitlist'
 import { Route as AppRouteImport } from './routes/_app'
 import { Route as IndexRouteImport } from './routes/index'
 import { Route as AuthSplatRouteImport } from './routes/auth.$'
-import { Route as ApiTunnelRouteImport } from './routes/api/tunnel'
 import { Route as ApiTranscriptsRouteImport } from './routes/api/transcripts'
 import { Route as ApiIngestRouteImport } from './routes/api/ingest'

   path: '/auth/$',
   getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
 } as any)
-const ApiTunnelRoute = ApiTunnelRouteImport.update({
-  id: '/api/tunnel',
-  path: '/api/tunnel',
-  getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
